title: ReUnmending
description: ReUnmending enhances Minecraft's item repair system by modifying Mending enchantment behavior, adding customizable tooltips, and fixing anvil interface issues.
body:
Unmending Potato Edition mod is now updated for Minecraft 1.20.1!

ReUnmending

ReUnmending is a Minecraft mod that focuses on modifying the behavior of the Mending enchantment. Key features of this mod include:

Key Features

  • Modification of Mending Enchantment: Prevents the Mending enchantment from being retained when using an anvil, thus avoiding issues with item repairs caused by Mending.
  • Customizable Tooltips: Allows players to choose whether to display repair information in item tooltips, with support for custom colors based on configuration.
  • Interface Adjustments: Fixes certain display issues in the anvil interface, providing a smoother user experience.
